Design system
🎨Design system
Relowa POC · v0.1 · master plan
Home

Relowa POC — Master Plan

The single source of truth for everything planned in the Phase 1 build of the B2B Waste Operating System. Every PRD, every ADR, every module, every milestone is linked here with current status.

Updated 2026-05-13. Read HANDOFF.md first if you are picking up the project from a session boundary.

Where the substrate is today

RLS substrate ✅
5/5 isolation tests green. 21 policies, 7 tables, audit hash chain, idempotency table all live.
Infrastructure ✅
Postgres 18 + Supabase Realtime + LocalStack + Adminer in docker-compose. Healthy on macOS.
Documentation system ✅
23 ADRs, 9 PRDs, 6 concept notes, 4 learned notes, 16 skill files (×2 runtimes), 16 test category docs, 1 master plan (this page).
Agent team (16) 📋
5 squads + lead orchestrator. Plan-then-execute. Index.
Test strategy 📋
Hybrid pyramid · 16 categories · targeted coverage gates. ADR-0017.
Hono API + EventBridge 📋
Planned in ADR-0009. Next implementation milestone (M2).
Cognito + SAML wiring 📋
Planned in ADR-0005 (operators) and ADR-0015 (staff). M1 schema, M5 panel.
Frontend kit + apps 📋
Planned in ADR-0011/0012. apps/web + apps/admin. M5.

The 9 module buckets

Maps the Master Icon System v2.5 poster to packages, routes, ADRs. See PRD-0004 for the full table.

System & Navigation P1
ADR-0011, ADR-0012, PRD-0005
Core Utilities P1
ADR-0011 (primitives)
User Roles (operator) substrate ✅
ADR-0003, ADR-0005
Staff Roles (internal) P1 schema
ADR-0014, ADR-0015
Marketplace P1
ADR-0009, ADR-0006
Logistics & Operations P1+P2
ADR-0010, ADR-0013
AI & Recognition P1 / P2
Greyparrot adapter (TBD)
IoT & Field P2 (stubbed)
UI placeholders only
ESG & Sustainability P1
ADR-0008
Finance & Compliance P1
ADR-0007

Milestones M0 → M5

Coverage of each module across the 6 milestones (per PRD-0003 + module map).

M0 (1-3)
M1 (4-6)
M2 (7-10)
M3 (11-13)
M4 (14-16)
M5 (17-18)
Infra
Auth/RLS
Marketplace
Logistics
Escrow/ESG
Frontend
Admin panel

Green = primary delivery · Purple = schema commits now / panel UI deferred to M6.

Product Requirements (PRDs)

PRD-0001 — Vision accepted
What Relowa is, who it's for, why now. The two-line success definition for Phase 1.
PRD-0002 — Phase 1 scope accepted
Core loop, in/out scope, deferred to P2/P3, cut criteria, risk ranking.
PRD-0003 — Phase 1 milestones accepted
M0–M5, 18-week roadmap, deliverable list per milestone, risk register.
PRD-0004 — Module map accepted
9-bucket taxonomy. Icon-poster ↔ frontend ↔ backend ↔ Figma screen reconciliation.
PRD-0005 — i18n & content accepted
Turkish-first, English second. next-intl. Turkish routes, English code. Translation policy.
PRD-0006 — Provider integrations drafted
Adapter interfaces + Manual reference implementation for escrow/e-fatura/AI scan. Real-provider specs deferred to ADRs 0027–0029.
PRD-0007 — Operations & support drafted
SLA tiers, escalation path, on-call (honest about solo), KVKK request flow, incident response, customer comms.
PRD-0008 — Pricing engine drafted
Tiered + split + per-tenant override fee model. Schema deferred to M4. Default 1.5%+1.5% with caps; fully customizable per-tenant.
PRD-0009 — Onboarding & verification drafted
3-stage pipeline: registration → verification (24h SLA) → activation + first-tender wizard. Çevre Lisansı + K1 docs first-class.

Architecture Decision Records

Foundation

ADR-0001 — Postgres as System of Record accepted
Postgres is the SoR. Everything else is derived. No second source-of-truth without an ADR.
ADR-0002 — Supabase Realtime historical
Standalone Realtime container for the POC. Superseded for production by ADR-0006.
ADR-0003 — RLS with JWT-via-GUC validated
Supabase's auth.uid() DX in vanilla Postgres. 21 policies green.
ADR-0004 — Multi-agent orchestration accepted
Skills + memory graph for AI agents working in this repo.

Identity & access

ADR-0005 — Cognito authentication drafted
Cognito issues identity; API re-signs session JWT with active_org_id. Unified login + post-login org selection.
ADR-0014 — Internal staff RBAC drafted
5 staff roles, app-layer RBAC, mandatory reason on every action, dual-audit impersonation.
ADR-0015 — Admin tooling isolation drafted
AWS Client VPN + Private DNS (admin.relowa.local) + SAML via IAM Identity Center. Three independent gates.

Business workflows

ADR-0009 — Local EventBridge bidding accepted
Hono + EventBridge Scheduler + Lambda. Soft-close anti-sniping. Local-first via LocalStack.
ADR-0010 — Carrier sub-auction drafted
Second auction loop: recycler opens carrier ad, carriers bid, recycler picks winner. Schema in M1.
ADR-0007 — Step Functions escrow drafted
Multi-day, multi-actor escrow state machine. Provider-agnostic adapter (Manual / Iyzico / PayTR).

Realtime & data

ADR-0006 — Outbox pattern for AppSync drafted
Transactional outbox + relay → AppSync subscriptions in prod, Supabase Realtime in dev. Env-flagged.
ADR-0008 — Arbitrum hash anchoring accepted
Daily Merkle root → Arbitrum One. Regulatory timestamping for CSRD/ESPR/WSR. ~$3.65/year.

Frontend & infra

ADR-0011 — UI kit & design tokens drafted
Canonical #00E676 brand-500, sidebar #0A2E1F. Three-layer component model. Lucide + duotone wrapper.
ADR-0012 — Frontend app architecture drafted
Two Next.js apps: apps/web (operator) + apps/admin (staff). Hybrid SSR + Hono data layer.
ADR-0013 — Map provider abstraction drafted
Pluggable tile + routing. MapLibre/OSRM POC → AWS Location production. KVKK-aligned.

Platform services

ADR-0018 — Notifications drafted
Email (SES) + SMS (Netgsm/Iletimerkezi) + Web Push + in-app. ~30 templates, per-user preferences, quiet hours, EU-resident throughout.
ADR-0019 — File storage drafted
5 S3 buckets (tender-photos, org-docs, e-fatura, audit-archive, public-assets). Presigned URLs + ClamAV scan + Object Lock + KMS.
ADR-0020 — Observability drafted
Sentry EU (errors) + PostHog EU (analytics) + CloudWatch (infra). 30-event taxonomy, PII scrubbed at source, KVKK-compliant.
ADR-0021 — Backup & DR drafted
RPO 15min / RTO 4h. Multi-AZ RDS + cross-region snapshots + S3 CRR. Quarterly restore drills. Object Lock for legal evidence.
ADR-0022 — Rate limiting drafted
AWS WAF + Redis sliding window. Per-endpoint policies. CAPTCHA escalation. SMS abuse + bid manipulation defenses.
ADR-0023 — Secrets management drafted
AWS Secrets Manager + KMS. 30+ secret inventory, rotation cadences (30/90/180/365d), dual-key JWT window, compromise runbooks.

Reserved / future

ADR-0024+ — TBD reserved
Greyparrot adapter spec (ADR-0029), Iyzico adapter (ADR-0027), Nilvera adapter (ADR-0028), Phase 2 IoT ingestion, mobile carrier driver app, RBAC time-bounded grants, and other future plans surfaced by ADR future-plans sections.

Frontend Guides

Component inventory drafted
Every Figma screen → which Layer 0/1/2 components compose it. Updated when Figma batches change.
Status taxonomy drafted
Canonical status codes across DB enums, audit events, badges, and TR/EN copy.

Agent Team (16 specialists)

Source of truth: ADR-0016. Canonical skill files in .opencode/skills/; mirrored to .claude/agents/; sync gate via pnpm agents:check. Plan-then-execute orchestration model with required-reading lists baked in.

Lead drafted
lead-orchestrator
Data & RLS 4 agents
migration-author · db-operator · rls-test-runner · audit-trail-verifier
API & Workflow 3 agents
endpoint-writer · event-bridge-wiring · state-machine-author
Frontend & UI 4 agents
design-system-keeper · feature-component-builder · route-page-builder · realtime-debugger
Cross-cutting 3 agents
tester · doc-keeper · compliance-specialist
DevOps 1 agent
ci-cd-engineer
Agents index + decision tree
"Which agent handles this?" — quick-pick decision tree, agent table, tiebreakers.
Team handbook
Worked feature walkthroughs A–F (new table+endpoint+UI, event workflows, perf, compliance, deploys).
Sync strategy
How .opencode/skills/ and .claude/agents/ stay byte-identical. CI-enforced.
ADR-0016 — the constitution accepted
Squad model, plan-then-execute orchestration, multi-runtime support, hand-off rules.

Test Strategy

Source of truth: ADR-0017. Hybrid pyramid (bash + Vitest + Playwright), 16 categories, targeted coverage thresholds on critical paths only.

Categories — P1 (built or to build)

RLS isolation 5/5 green
Cross-tenant + intra-org role boundaries. bash + psql. The substrate.
Migration smoke P1
Fresh-db apply + idempotency check. Bash.
Audit chain integrity P1
SHA-256 chain verification on audit_events + admin_audit_log. Pre-anchor gate.
API unit P1
Vitest, co-located. Owned by the specialist who wrote the code.
API integration P1
Vitest + real Postgres + real Hono. Idempotency, RLS, audit, outbox per endpoint.
Event flow P1
Outbox → relay → AppSync mock. Replay safety, ordering, FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED.
State machine P1
Step Functions Local. Escrow happy path + dispute + timeout + manual override.
Auction lifecycle E2E P1
The canonical demo: producer → tender → bid → close → winner → audit. Bash + curl.
Frontend component P1
Vitest + React Testing Library + axe. Primitives, patterns, feature components.
Frontend E2E P1 minimal
Playwright. 3 critical paths @critical. Full suite nightly.
Contract (OpenAPI ↔ Hono) P1 light
Snapshot-based breaking-change detection on generated OpenAPI spec.
Security P1 CI
gitleaks, pnpm audit, OWASP ZAP, image scan. Hard fail on high severity.
i18n + a11y P1
ESLint rules (no-literal-string, key existence) + axe in component + page tests.
Compliance (KVKK / CSRD / ESPR / WSR) P1 manual
Checklist now, semi-automated P2. Auto-invoked on PII/money/audit/ESG triggers.

Categories — P2 (scaffolded, not yet running)

Visual regression P2
Playwright snapshot diff. Doc + CI scaffold P1; nightly runs in P2.
Performance / load P2
k6 bid storm + escrow batch + AppSync subscriber load. Weekly cron when graduated.
ADR-0017 — Test strategy accepted
Hybrid pyramid, ownership map, coverage policy reasoning, P2/P3 deferral pattern.
Test conventions
Naming, file layout, factory patterns, transaction rollback, polling instead of sleeping.
Running tests locally
Quick map of every category, prerequisites, watch mode, coverage commands.
CI pipeline runbook
GH Actions workflows, AWS OIDC trust, deploy targets, recovery playbook.

Concepts (memory graph)

auth.uid() pattern
Supabase RLS DX in vanilla Postgres. 30 lines of SQL plus 5 lines of middleware.
Audit hash chain
SHA-256 chain on every audit row. Tampering detectable without trusting the operator.
Hash anchoring
32-byte Merkle root on Arbitrum One. Independent verification with no trust in Relowa infra.
Idempotency
Every mutation accepts an Idempotency-Key. Replays return cached response. Discipline starts now.
Multi-tenancy
org / user / role model. Why org_members over users.org_id. RLS cross-tenant enforcement.
Server-authoritative state
The server, not the client, decides when an auction closes. EventBridge Scheduler every 30s.

How to use this page

  • New session? Read HANDOFF.md first, then this page top-to-bottom, then the ADRs/PRDs relevant to your task.
  • Planning a new module? Check the 9-bucket map (PRD-0004), find your bucket's ADRs, write a new ADR if the answer isn't there.
  • Adding a new screen? Map it to a module bucket first, then to components in the component inventory. If the status codes don't exist, update status-taxonomy.md first.
  • Status pill legend: accepted / done drafted planned historical / deferred

Markdown sources for newly drafted documents live under docs/adr/, docs/prd/, and docs/frontend/. The legacy .html versions in _site/ are the previously-published wiki pages and will be regenerated on the next site build.
